title: Swiggy SARAL — consent as a product feature, not a legal tax
subtitle: Simple · Accessible · Rational · Actionable · Legal. From all-or-nothing to just-in-time, just-enough, just-for-now.
diagram_alt: Age gate → unbundled buckets → JIT notices → multilingual layer → Consent Manager → Kafka → immutable Ledger → Audit API.

pillars.d: Essential (inline, no opt-out) vs Optional (granular, un-ticked toggles).
Ask at the moment of need + value exchange (₹50 off for WhatsApp alerts).
12 languages, 8th-grade reading level, icon per data category.
Immutable signed log; DPB-auditable in <2 min. Kafka → WORM → Audit API.
Age gate → Guardian Consent Mode; child account runs data-minimal.

notes: SARAL re-architects how Swiggy treats user autonomy. Ledger = insurance. JIT = conversion strategy. Children's gateway = legal shield.
